Off Calendar Apr-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO DELUXE SIGHTSEEING, LLC'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE

Appearances: Enoch Wang of Wild, Carey & Fife (415.837.3101) for petitioner and moving party; Christine Van Aken of the Office of the City Attorney (415.554.4633) for respondents and opposing parties.

Argued and the Court takes the matter under submission. Ms. Van Aken is to submit a proposed form of order that tracks the tentative ruling. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR 5976
